subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Thy letter was laid before Us, and that which was inscribed therein hath been presented by this servant in attendance to the Divine Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای علی کتابت حاضر و آنچه در او مسطور بود عبد حاضر لدی العرش معروض داشت
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort
